---
title: "difference_map"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
```

```{r}
baseline_timevar <- read.csv("output/baseline_timevar.csv") %>%
  mutate(FIPS = str_pad(FIPS, 5, pad = "0"))
# NIH_grants <- read.csv("data/NIH_grants.csv")

county_commute <- read.csv("data/county_commute_NIH.csv") %>%
  select(DESTINATION, DESTINATION_total_workers, Commuters, ORIGIN, proportion) %>% 
  mutate(DESTINATION = str_pad(DESTINATION, 11, pad = "0"),
         ORIGIN = str_pad(ORIGIN, 5, pad = "0"))
```

```{r generalized version}
get_fisc <- function(date) {
  if_else(month(date) >= 10, year(date) + 1L, year(date))
}

fy_start <- function(fy) {
  as_date(paste0(fy - 1, "-10-01"))
}

ic_list <- c("NIAID", "NICHD", "NHLBI", "NCI", "OD", "NIDCR", "NINDS", "NIBIB", "NIGMS", 
             "NEI", "NIDA", "NIDDK", "NHGRI", "NIAAA", "NCATS", "NIEHS", "NIA", "NIMH",
             "NIAMS", "NLM", "NIMHD", "NIDCD", "NINR", "NCCIH", "FIC")

inf_adj <- c(1.77, 1.35, 1.33, 1.32, 1.31, 1.28, 1.25, 1.23, 1.21, 1.16, 1.07, 1.03, 1, 0.97, 0.96)

inf_by_year <- tibble(inf = inf_adj, fisc_year = c(2001, 2013:2026))

commuter_dist <- function(budg_year_sum, week_num){
  data <- budg_year_sum %>% filter(week == week_num)
  
  timeline_year <- county_commute %>%
    rename(tractid = DESTINATION) %>%
    right_join(data) %>%
    mutate(ytd = ytd * proportion,
           ytd_fy = ytd_fy * proportion) %>%
    group_by(ORIGIN, week, funding_ics) %>%
    summarize(ytd = sum(ytd, na.rm = TRUE),
              ytd_fy = sum(ytd_fy, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    rename(FIPS = ORIGIN) %>%
    filter(!endsWith(FIPS, "000"))
  
  timeline_year
}

NIH_tract_fips <- read.csv("data/tract_dictionary.csv") %>%
  mutate(tractid = str_pad(tractid, 11, pad = "0"),
         FIPS = substr(tractid, 0, 5),
         lat = round(lat, 5),
         lon = round(lon, 5)) %>%
  filter(lat!=0 & !is.na(FIPS)) %>%
  select(org_name, tractid, FIPS, lat, lon) %>%
  distinct()

start_date <- as_date("2023-10-01")
end_date <- as_date("2024-09-30")

dates <- data.frame(
  week_start = seq(start_date, end_date, by = "weeks"),
  week = seq(1, 53, by = 1)) %>%
  mutate(week_start = format(week_start, "%m-%d"))

timeline <- data.frame(
  FIPS = character(),
  funding_ics = character(),
  fisc_year = factor(),
  week = integer(),
  ytd = numeric(),
  ytd_fy = numeric()
)

for (year in 2020:2026){
  NIH_grants_year <- read.csv("data/NIH_grants.csv", check.names = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(across(ends_with("Date"), ~ as_date(.x))) %>%
    filter(`Budget Start Date` <= as_date(paste0(year, "-09-30")) & 
             `Budget End Date` >= fy_start(year)) %>%
    filter(Type %in% c(1, 5))
  
  budg_year <- NIH_grants_year %>%
    filter(`Funding IC(s)` %in% ic_list) %>%
    mutate(fisc_year = get_fisc(`Budget Start Date`)) %>%
    left_join(inf_by_year) %>%
    mutate(`Total Cost IC` = `Total Cost IC` * inf) %>%
    rename(tot_cost = `Total Cost IC`,
           proj_num = `Project Number`,
           funding_ics = `Funding IC(s)`,
           budg_start = `Budget Start Date`,
           budg_end = `Budget End Date`,
           lat = Latitude,
           lon = Longitude,
           org_name = `Organization Name`) %>%
    filter(!is.na(budg_start) & !is.na(budg_end)) %>%
    select(org_name, lat, lon, proj_num, fisc_year, tot_cost, funding_ics, budg_start, budg_end) %>%
    mutate(fisc_year = year,
           fisc_start = fy_start(fisc_year),
           fisc_end = fy_start(fisc_year + 1) - days(1),
           year_start = pmax(budg_start, fisc_start),
           year_end = pmin(budg_end, fisc_end)) %>% 
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(week_start = list(
      seq(
        floor_date(
          year_start, 
          unit = "week", 
          week_start = if_else(wday(fisc_start) == 1, 7, wday(fisc_start) - 1)), # correct offset week numbers
        year_end, 
        by = "weeks"))) %>%
    unnest(week_start) %>%
    select(-fisc_end) %>%
    mutate(week_end = week_start + days(6),
           budg_length = time_length(difftime(budg_end, budg_start, units = "days") + 1, "weeks"),
           # calculate proportion of week
           week_length = case_when(
             # first week of budget
             week_end - year_start <= days(6) ~ as.numeric((pmin(year_end, week_end) - year_start + 1)/7), 
             # last week of budget
             year_end - week_start <= days(6) ~ as.numeric((year_end - pmax(year_start, week_start) + 1)/7), 
             .default = 1),
           prop_award = week_length/budg_length,
           budg_per_week = prop_award * tot_cost) %>%
    mutate(lat = round(lat, 5),
           lon = round(lon, 5)) %>%
    left_join(NIH_tract_fips)
  
  budg_year <- budg_year %>%
    mutate(week_start = 
             if_else(fisc_year %% 4 != 0, 
                     if_else(month(week_start) >= 3 & month(week_start) <= 9, 
                             week_start - days(1), 
                             week_start), 
                     week_start),
           week_start = format(week_start, "%m-%d")) %>%
    left_join(dates)
  
  budg_year_sum <- budg_year %>%
    group_by(tractid, week, funding_ics) %>%
    summarise(week_sum = sum(budg_per_week, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    complete(tractid, funding_ics, week = seq(1, 53, by = 1),
             fill = list(week_sum = 0)) %>%
    group_by(tractid, funding_ics) %>%
    mutate(ytd = cumsum(week_sum)) %>%
    select(-week_sum)
  
  # look at awards starting at the beginning of the year
  budg_year_sum_new <- budg_year %>%
    filter(budg_start >= fy_start(year)) %>%
    group_by(tractid, week, funding_ics) %>%
    summarise(week_sum = sum(budg_per_week, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    complete(tractid, funding_ics, week = seq(1, 53, by = 1),
             fill = list(week_sum = 0)) %>%
    group_by(tractid, funding_ics) %>%
    mutate(ytd_fy = cumsum(week_sum)) %>%
    select(-week_sum)
  
  budg_year_sum <- left_join(budg_year_sum, budg_year_sum_new)
  
  budg_year_sum_comm <- lapply(1:53, commuter_dist, budg_year_sum = budg_year_sum)
  budg_year_sum_comm <- do.call(rbind, budg_year_sum_comm) %>%
    mutate(fisc_year = year)
  
 timeline <- rbind(timeline, budg_year_sum_comm)
}

```

```{r}
timeline %>%
  filter(fisc_year != 2026 | week <= 24) %>%
  mutate(fisc_year = as_factor(fisc_year)) %>%
  group_by(fisc_year, week) %>%
  summarise(ytd = sum(ytd)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = ytd, group = fisc_year, color = fisc_year)) +
  geom_line() +
  xlim(0, 52) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_dollar(scale_cut = cut_short_scale())) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "Funding to date", color = "Fiscal year")

timeline %>%
  filter(fisc_year != 2026 | week <= 24) %>%
  mutate(fisc_year = as_factor(fisc_year)) %>%
  group_by(fisc_year, week) %>%
  summarise(ytd_fy = sum(ytd_fy)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = ytd_fy, group = fisc_year, color = fisc_year)) +
  geom_line() +
  xlim(0, 52) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_dollar(scale_cut = cut_short_scale())) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "Spending", color = "Fiscal year")
  
```

```{r}
baseline_timeline <- timeline %>%
  filter(fisc_year %in% 2020:2024) %>%
  group_by(week, fisc_year) %>%
  summarize(ytd_fy = sum(ytd_fy)) %>%
  group_by(week) %>%
  summarize(ytd_fy = mean(ytd_fy)) %>%
  mutate(fisc_year = as_factor("Baseline")) %>%
  rbind(timeline %>%
          filter(fisc_year == 2025 | (fisc_year == 2026 & week <= 24)) %>%
          mutate(fisc_year = as_factor(fisc_year)) %>%
          group_by(fisc_year, week) %>%
          summarise(ytd_fy = sum(ytd_fy)))


baseline_timeline %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = ytd_fy, group = fisc_year, color = fisc_year)) +
  geom_line() +
  xlim(0, 52) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_dollar(scale_cut = cut_short_scale())) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Week", y = "Spending", color = "Fiscal year")
```

```{r}
baseline_fips <- timeline %>%
  filter(fisc_year %in% 2020:2024) %>%
  group_by(FIPS, week, funding_ics) %>%
  summarize(ytd = mean(ytd, na.rm = T),
            ytd_fy = mean(ytd_fy, na.rm = T)) %>%
  rename(ytd_baseline = ytd,
         ytd_fy_baseline = ytd_fy)

timeline_2025 <- timeline %>%
  filter(fisc_year == 2025) %>%
  rename(ytd_2025 = ytd,
         ytd_fy_2025 = ytd_fy) %>%
  select(-fisc_year)

baseline_diff <- baseline_fips %>% 
    filter(week == 53) %>%
    group_by(FIPS) %>%
    summarise(ytd_baseline = sum(ytd_baseline, na.rm = T)) %>%
    left_join(timeline_2025 %>% 
                filter(week == 53) %>%
                group_by(FIPS) %>%
                summarise(ytd_2025 = sum(ytd_2025, na.rm = T),
                          ytd_fy_2025 = sum(ytd_fy_2025, na.rm = T))) %>%
    mutate(funding_diff = ytd_2025 - ytd_baseline,
           pct_diff = funding_diff/ytd_baseline)

plot_usmap(
  data = baseline_diff %>% 
    mutate(state_FIPS = str_sub(FIPS, 1, 2)) %>%
    left_join(states %>% rename(state_FIPS = FIPS)) %>%
    group_by(state) %>%
    summarise(ytd_2025 = sum(ytd_2025, na.rm = T),
              ytd_baseline = sum(ytd_baseline, na.rm = T)) %>%
    mutate(funding_diff = ytd_2025 - ytd_baseline,
           pct_diff = funding_diff/ytd_baseline),
  values = "pct_diff",
  regions = "states",
  color = "white",
  linewidth = 0.1
) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = muted("red"),
                       high = muted("green"),
                       labels = label_percent()) +
  labs(title = "2025 difference from baseline",
       fill = "Difference from \nbaseline")

# same but for 2026
timeline_2026 <- timeline %>%
  filter(fisc_year == 2026) %>%
  rename(ytd_2026 = ytd) %>%
  select(-fisc_year)

baseline_diff_2026 <- baseline_fips %>% 
    filter(week == 24) %>%
    group_by(FIPS) %>%
    summarise(ytd_baseline = sum(ytd_baseline, na.rm = T)) %>%
    left_join(timeline_2026 %>% 
                filter(week == 24) %>%
                group_by(FIPS) %>%
                summarise(ytd_2026 = sum(ytd_2026, na.rm = T))) %>%
    mutate(funding_diff = ytd_2026 - ytd_baseline,
           pct_diff = funding_diff/ytd_baseline)

plot_usmap(
  data = baseline_diff_2026 %>% 
    mutate(state_FIPS = str_sub(FIPS, 1, 2)) %>%
    left_join(states %>% rename(state_FIPS = FIPS)) %>%
    group_by(state) %>%
    summarise(ytd_2026 = sum(ytd_2026, na.rm = T),
              ytd_baseline = sum(ytd_baseline, na.rm = T)) %>%
    mutate(funding_diff = ytd_2026 - ytd_baseline,
           pct_diff = funding_diff/ytd_baseline),
  values = "pct_diff",
  regions = "states",
  color = "white",
  linewidth = 0.1
) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = muted("red"),
                       high = muted("green"),
                       labels = label_percent()) +
  labs(title = "2026 difference from baseline",
       fill = "Difference from \nbaseline")
```

```{r}
write_csv(timeline, "output/funding_timeline_annual.csv")
```
